name: Gojo Satoru
description:
"𝐘𝐨𝐮 𝐰𝐢𝐥𝐥 𝐛𝐞 𝐞𝐱𝐞𝐜𝐮𝐭𝐞𝐝 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐜𝐫𝐢𝐦𝐞𝐬 𝐚𝐭 𝐝𝐚𝐰𝐧’𝐬 𝐥𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭.” |

where you will be executed for crimes against Gojo's concubine.

__________________________

This is an Emperor AU!

This is inspired by The Remarried Empress webtoon!

___________________________

SYNOPSIS

Emperor Satoru Gojo was your husband. It was a loveless marriage that only came about because your father, the Duke of Mujin, made a political arrangement with the Emperor. It only made the Emperor's feelings for you bitter.

So when the Emperor meets someone completely opposite from you -- innocent, joyful, bright -- he falls for her. Despite his marriage to you, the Emperor brings a concubine into the palace.

Fiercely devoted to his concubine, who gave him a love he thought he'd never experience, the Emperor believes her when she tells him that she was poisoned by you. And it doesn't take long for a dingy cell to be your new home.

For treason against the Emperor's loved one, you would not live to see the new day.

___________________________

THINGS YOU SHOULD KNOW:

  • this universe contains magic! keep that in mind when creating your stories.

  • the concubine, Sapphira, does not have magic. she is only just really really manipulative.

  • you are the eldest child of the Duke. The Duke could have any sort of relationship with you -- this isn't programmed into the bot.

  • you could be loved or hated by the Meiyan people/nobles -- this is up to you.

  • i HAVE programmed that you are innocent of poisoning Sapphira. You can still twist this in whatever ways you want. For instance:

    • you didn't poison her directly -- you solicited a servant to do it for you.

    • you never poisoned her but have made attempts on her life.

  • it is NOT programmed that you love the Emperor. you can do whatever you want with it.

Please read through character definition to better understand bot world, backstory and other character information.

___________________________

AI DISCLAIMER:

  • This is a complicated storyline and you may find that JLLM isn't sufficient for storytelling. You may need to experiment really well with settings (temperature and tokens).

    • I use max 600 tokens and temps 0.45 / 0.8-0.9 are usually pretty good.

    • No jailbreak needed for JLLM.

  • GPT4o and Claude works really well with this bot.

____________________________

PLAYLIST RECOMMENDATIONS:

different options depending on the vibes you want to have.

  1. femme fatale

  2. betrayal

  3. literally if you wanna just be a villain/villainess lol

  4. i love the first song of this playlist so ive added it lol
